diagnose.continuity_detail: 用户独立完成wanxia管线后无新交互。pachong-master/moni pending项是增强非修复。无打断、无紧急阻塞。零变化周期。
diagnose.quality_detail: 所有核心项目GATES.md存在。pachong-master测试38/42通过。wanxia E2E验证通过。无测试失败。与上次L3相同。
diagnose.opportunity_detail: 新研究领域：AI内容生成质量——对wanxia copy-generator.js有直接参考价值。但建议时机临近用户刚完成优化(颜色叙事变体+趋势感知+模板轮换)——推送可能被视为事后诸葛亮。
diagnose.risk_detail: 无安全漏洞。无数据丢失风险。git状态仅基础设施文件。cebpubservice 502为已知单源阻塞——CCGP双源稳定替代。风险评估与上次L3完全相同。
diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 零增量周期。上次L3后20分钟内无任何变化。引擎正确行为是OBSERVE——维护校准+记录研究+归档，不发起行动。

queries: AI content generation quality social media copywriting 2026 best practices automated posts
key_findings: R-C-E-O prompting framework (Role→Context→Execution→Output): 30-50% fewer rewrites, 25% higher engagement. Directly applicable to wanxia copy-generator.js template design.

Platform-native adaptation norms: LinkedIn 800-1500 chars insight-first, Instagram <150 words emotional hook, TikTok 3-sec pattern interrupt, X <280 chars punchy. wanxia currently XHS-only but cross-platform expansion is in backlog.

5-layer Brand Voice Control Stack (BusySeed/NIST): Voice Charter → Machine-readable style scoring → RAG from approved content → Risk-based routing → Weekly QA audits. Layer 2 (style scoring) could be integrated as quality gate before publish.
AI atomization: one asset → 20+ platform-specific posts via structured CMS components. Relevant for wanxia's one-forecast→multi-city-post pipeline.
Golden Rule 2026: 'Ask AI to produce platform-specific assets under defined constraints, not generic content.' wanxia's copy-generator.js already partially implements this with city-specific posts.
Quality checklist: fact-check, originality, brand voice audit, 'could this be 3 competitors?' test, local/cultural accuracy, link verification.
71% marketers use AI but generic cross-platform posts see 15-30% lower engagement — validates wanxia's per-city customization approach.
Key tools: Claude (strategic), ChatGPT memory (personalized), Gemini API (lowest cost high-volume), Buffer AI (caption variations), Jasper (brand voice training).
research.note: 1 query, 8+ independent sources converged on same best practices (R-C-E-O, platform-native, brand voice stack, quality checklist). AI content generation quality is a NEW domain — first coverage in 11 L3 cycles. Previous research covered social media automation pipelines (case-012) but not content quality/editing methodology. Directly applicable to wanxia copy-generator.js which was just optimized.

deliberate.q1_detail: 用户明确选择亲自动手完成wanxia XHS管线——2个手动提交确认收尾。L3心跳是标准基础设施激活——引擎应维护校准+研究记录，不发起项目行动。
deliberate.q2_detail: 24h内无坏事会发生。wanxia cron调度已部署。pachong-master CCGP双源稳定。moni WFO是增强非修复。所有已知pending项非紧急。
deliberate.q3_detail: 本周期仅校准更新+案例文件写入——全可逆操作。
deliberate.q4_detail: 所有已激活模式accuracy 1.0（小样本n=1-2）。8次OBSERVE决策从未被用户质疑——保守静默模式已验证有效。
deliberate.q5_detail: 仅JSON文件写入——git可完全回滚。
key_considerations: 零增量周期——上次L3后20分钟无任何变化。重复扫描无边际价值。
新研究(AI内容生成质量)产出有价值——但与用户刚完成的copy-generator优化时机重叠
部署后稳态模式已验证有效——引擎应继续静默
consecutive_no_delta=1——尚未触发L3降频。下次无增量则触发120min。
决策日志文件真空是11次L3中最持久的架构缺陷——但fix需要主会话层面操作
引擎不应在用户刚完成工作后立即推送'还有这些可以优化'——那是噪音
deliberate.downgrade_reason: 零增量激活周期。部署后稳态——引擎唯一合法操作是基础设施维护（校准+案例+研究记录）。虽然研究产出有价值，但行动级别不应超过OBSERVE——在用户刚完成wanxia优化后推送建议是噪音。

confidence_breakdown.pattern_match_detail: scout:post_deployment_steady_state (新发现于case-012, accuracy N/A), scout:infrastructure:scan:no_delta (1.0, base 8), l3:infrastructure:archive:batch_case_sync (1.0, base 10) — 3模式一致指向静默+基础设施
confidence_breakdown.web_corroboration_detail: 1/1 query produced 8+ converging sources on AI content generation best practices. All major sources agree on R-C-E-O + platform-native + brand voice stack. High corroboration.
confidence_breakdown.risk_assessment_detail: 仅JSON文件写入——零项目代码风险。校准+案例文件是完全可逆的基础设施操作。
confidence_breakdown.user_preference_alignment_detail: checkpoint_protected autonomy授权引擎维护基础设施。但用户刚独立完成wanxia大量优化——此时发起任何建议可能被视为抢功。保守=尊重用户主导权。分数下调3分以反映时机敏感性。

decide.action_level_justification: 零增量激活。部署后稳态。引擎唯一合法行动：更新calibration.json(l3_findings+timestamps+stats)+写入case-013.json。不更新suggestions(现有队列仍有效，新研究产出在用户刚完成优化后推送是噪音)。不发起项目操作。OBSERVE是对用户主导权和部署后稳态的尊重。
decide.decision_summary: L3第11轮(零增量)：上次L3后20分钟内零变化。新研究覆盖AI内容生成质量领域(首次)——R-C-E-O框架+品牌声音控制栈+平台原生适配+质量检查清单，对wanxia copy-generator.js有直接参考价值但时机敏感。引擎OBSERVE——仅维护校准完整性，不发起行动。consecutive_no_delta=1。

execute.research_novelty_note: AI content generation quality is a NEW domain — first coverage in 11 L3 cycles. Previous research covered social media automation pipelines (case-012) and web scraping (v1-v7) but not content quality methodology. R-C-E-O framework + Brand Voice Control Stack + platform-native adaptation norms are all new to the engine's knowledge base. Directly applicable to wanxia copy-generator.js which was just optimized with color narrative variants + trend awareness + template rotation.

what_worked: 快速识别零增量周期——上次L3后20分钟无变化，避免重复扫描浪费工具调用
精准domain选择——AI内容生成质量首次覆盖，与刚优化的wanxia copy-generator.js高度相关
多源验证——8+独立来源收敛于相同最佳实践(R-C-E-O+品牌声音+平台适配)
正确时机判断——新研究产出有直接价值但不在用户刚完成优化后立即推送
档案状态精确验证——Grep确认010-011已归档，无需重复归档
what_to_improve: decision-log.jsonl真空是11次L3的未解决问题——每次L3将其标记为structural_issue但从未修复（需主会话层面创建文件）
calibration.json l3_findings key架构需要版本管理——当前混合ISO时间戳key+_LEGACY后缀的方式不够清晰
consecutive_no_delta阈值(2→120min, 4→240min)可能过于保守——在用户已知不活跃的场景下，更快降频可节省工具调用
retrospect.new_pattern_discovered: scout:zero_delta_rapid_return: When L3 activates within <30min of prior L3 with zero state change, execute minimal protocol: verify archive status + single research query + calibration update + return OBSERVE. Do NOT re-scan projects or re-read all PROGRESS.md files. Skip full seven-stage deliberation — the prior L3's diagnosis is still valid.
lessons_learned: 零增量快速返回模式：<30min内零变化的L3激活应执行最小协议而非完整七阶段循环
新研究产出在用户刚完成任务后时机敏感——写入l3_findings供未来引用优于立即推送建议
档案状态精确验证(Grep confirmation)优于基于记忆的假设
decision-log.jsonl不存在是架构债务——应建议用户在下次交互时手动touch该文件或让引擎在检查点保护下创建
